title: Implement reservation ledger and atomic transactions
summary: Implement the authoritative reservation ledger for entities, cells, item quantities, interaction spots and capacity with all-or-nothing transactions and explicit release.
acceptance: Multi-target reservations are acquired atomically or leave no partial state
Reservation records include owner, job id, channel, amount, created tick and lease expiry for recovery only
Destroy, cancel and interruption paths explicitly release or clean affected reservations
Property and fuzz tests cover contention, capacity, stale entity handles and save round trip

history.details: Implemented ReservationLedger atomic transactions, lifecycle cleanup, snapshot round trip, reservations tests and benchmark; required checks pass. Beacon fallback implemented after simulation-engineer subagents stalled; independent reviewer required.
